channel.title: Casa Inteligente EN
channel.description: Guides, reviews and comparisons of smart home products. Honest reviews of Amazon Alexa, Google Home, Xiaomi, Aqara and more.

item.title: 5 Smart Home Products Under €5 — Buy ​​Today and Get Started
item.description: The cheapest smart home products on Amazon.es. All under €5 — ideal for starting your smart home without spending almost anything.

item.title: Smart Home for Less than €100 — Low-Cost Guide 2026
item.description: Build your smart home with less than €100. Practical guide with detailed budget: lamps, sensors, sockets and step-by-step automations.

item.title: Top 5 Smart Home Products for Less than €10 — 2026 Guide
item.description: The best smart home products for less than €10. Sockets, lamps, sensors and switches — automate your home with little money.

item.title: How to Create Automation Routines at Home — Step-by-Step Guide 2026
item.description: Learn how to create smart automations at home. Routines with Alexa, Google Home and sensors — practical examples to start today.

item.title: Top 10 AliExpress Smart Home Products — 2026 Guide
item.description: Selection of the best smart home products on AliExpress. Aqara sensors, Sonoff sockets, Yeelight bulbs and more — with affiliate links and prices.

item.title: Best Smart Plugs 2026 — TP-Link Tapo vs Amazon vs Shelly
item.description: We compare the 3 most popular WiFi smart sockets. Tapo P115, Amazon Smart Plug and Shelly Plug S — price, features and energy consumption.

item.title: Philips Hue vs TP-Link Tapo L530E — Which is the Best Smart Bulb in 2026?
item.description: We compare the two most popular smart bulbs. Philips Hue (starter kit) vs TP-Link Tapo L530E — price, light quality, app and compatibility.

item.title: Temperature and Humidity Sensors for Smart Homes — Which is Best?
item.description: Complete guide to smart temperature and humidity sensors. We compare Aqara, SwitchBot and Govee — accuracy, price, compatibility and autonomy.

item.title: Xiaomi vs Tuya: Which is the Best Smart Home Ecosystem?
item.description: Xiaomi Aqara or Tuya? We compared price, compatibility, quality and ease of use of the two ecosystems.

item.title: Complete Smart Home Guide for Beginners 2026
item.description: Everything you need to start automating your home. From essential devices to step-by-step configuration.

item.title: Best Smart Speakers 2026: Alexa vs Google Nest vs HomePod
item.description: We compared the best smart speakers on the market. Which is best for you? Find out in this complete review.
